entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Introduced 2009, common-rail 2.0L diesel balancing economy and refinement for mainstream MPV use.
compatibleVariants: T3 2.0 D-4D, TR 2.0 D-4D, T Spirit 2.0 D-4D, Excel 2.0 D-4D
commonFailures: Injector failure causing misfires and power loss (~€500 repair)
EGR valve clogging requiring cleaning/replacement
Head gasket failure on high-mileage units

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Toyota's flagship 2.2L D-CAT diesel with DPF, offering 150hp but known for DPF sensor issues.
compatibleVariants: TR 2.2 D-CAT, T Spirit 2.2 D-CAT, Excel 2.2 D-CAT
commonFailures: DPF differential pressure sensor failure (P1426, P2002 codes)
EGR system clogging on short-journey vehicles
Injector failure leading to rough running
entries.cta: Get quotes for 2AD-FHV Toyota Verso engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel (Corolla Verso)
entries.history: Pre-2009 Corolla Verso diesel using timing belt; reliable but requires belt changes every 60-80k miles.
commonFailures: Timing belt failure if not replaced on schedule
Injector wear causing hard starting
Turbo oil seal leaks on high-mileage units

commonFailures: Excessive oil consumption from piston ring wear
Timing chain stretch at 150,000-200,000 km
Water pump failure around 50,000 km intervals

commonProblems.h2: Toyota Verso Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense

problems.h4: DPF Differential Pressure Sensor Failure - Why 2.2 D-CAT Versos Fail
problems.rootCause: The DPF differential pressure sensor fails, sending negative values to the ECU and triggering P1426/P2002 codes, causing limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty DPF pressure sensor, clear codes
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; DPF may still clog if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Professional DPF cleaning, sensor replacement, forced regeneration
repairOptions.longevity: Better value if DPF not severely blocked; requires motorway driving

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 2AD-FHV with upgraded components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best long-term solution for high-mileage Versos; eliminates DPF risk

problems.recommendation: For Versos under 90k miles with otherwise good condition, sensor replacement plus DPF cleaning offers good value. For vehicles over 110k miles or with repeated DPF warnings, a rebuilt engine with warranty is often more cost-effective than repeated repairs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2AD-FHV engine prices for your Toyota Verso

problems.h4: Excessive Oil Consumption - Why 1.6 Valvematic Versos Burn Oil
problems.rootCause: Piston ring wear allows oil to enter combustion chambers, causing consumption exceeding 1L per 1,000 miles and potential catalytic converter damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace valve stem seals, PCV valve, gaskets; decarbonise
repairOptions.longevity: May reduce consumption temporarily; doesn't address ring wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Engine strip, new piston rings, bearings, gaskets; bench test
repairOptions.longevity: Effective but labour-intensive; similar cost to rebuilt unit

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 1ZR-FAE with upgraded rings, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage units; eliminates oil consumption risk

problems.recommendation: If your 1ZR-FAE Verso is consuming over 1L/1,000 miles and has exceeded 110k miles, a rebuilt engine typically offers better long-term value than major internal repairs, especially with warranty coverage.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 1ZR-FAE Toyota Verso engine replacement

problems.h4: Timing Chain Stretch - Why High-Mileage Petrol Versos Need Attention
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioner wear allows chain stretch, causing rattling noise, poor timing, and potential valve damage if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioner, guides; reset timing
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective if caught early before damage; requires specialist tools

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Chain kit plus water pump replacement (common concurrent failure)
repairOptions.longevity: Smart preventative maintenance at 120k+ miles; extends engine life

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with new chain system, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if chain noise present with other symptoms or high mileage

problems.recommendation: If you hear chain rattle but the engine runs smoothly, a preventative chain kit from a specialist offers excellent value. If rattling is accompanied by misfires, oil consumption, or the engine has exceeded 130k miles, replacement is often the smarter investment.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 1ZR-FAE/2ZR-FAE engine prices for your Verso

problems.h4: Water Pump Failure - The 50,000 km Weak Point on Petrol Versos
problems.rootCause: Water pump bearing/seal failure causes coolant leaks, overheating, and potential head gasket damage if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace pump, gasket, coolant; pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Standard repair; recommended at first sign of leak or as preventative

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Water pump plus timing chain kit; efficient combined labour
repairOptions.longevity: Smart preventative package for engines approaching 100k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit if overheating caused internal damage
repairOptions.longevity: Only if pump failure led to head gasket or bearing damage

problems.recommendation: Water pump replacement is a routine, affordable repair. Only consider engine replacement if coolant loss caused overheating damage - verify compression and oil condition first.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Verso petrol engine replacement

problems.h4: Injector Failure - Diesel Verso Power Loss & Misfires
problems.rootCause: Diesel injector wear or carbon buildup causes poor atomisation, leading to misfires, smoke, and reduced power.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty injector, code to ECU, test run
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective for isolated injector failure on otherwise healthy engine

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all injectors, recalibrate, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if multiple injectors failing or engine over 120k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt diesel engine with new injectors, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if injector failure accompanied by turbo/DPF issues

problems.recommendation: For isolated injector failure on a well-maintained Verso under 110k miles, replacement injectors offer good value. If multiple injectors are failing or the engine has other issues, a rebuilt unit with warranty is often more economical long-term.

problems.h4: Head Gasket Failure - When Diesel Versos Overheat
problems.rootCause: Coolant loss from water pump or thermostat failure causes overheating, warping the cylinder head and blowing the gasket.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove head, machine surface, new gasket, reassemble
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block undamaged; requires specialist machining

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Head skim/valve work plus gasket; pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Better longevity if head was warped; still labour-intensive

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with warranty; no machining delays
repairOptions.longevity: Often faster and better value than major repair on high-mileage diesel

problems.recommendation: Head gasket repair is viable on lower-mileage Versos with otherwise good condition. For engines over 130k miles or with additional issues, a rebuilt engine with warranty typically offers better value and faster turnaround.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Verso diesel engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Toyota Verso
finalCta.paragraph: Whether your Verso suffers from DPF sensor errors, oil consumption, timing chain noise, or injector failure, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Toyota Verso specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point and comes with a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. With nationwide delivery and supply & fit options, get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Toyota Verso Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Toyota Verso and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineTypes.intro: Every Toyota Verso engine type is available through our UK network with typical price ranges based on variant, engine code and budget.

types.title: Toyota Verso Reconditioned Engines (Recon)
types.description: Professionally stripped, cleaned and rebuilt with new gaskets, seals and bearings to restore performance.
types.frontDescription: Professionally stripped, cleaned and rebuilt with new gaskets, seals and bearings to restore performance.
types.frontDisclaimer: Prices vary by engine code, mileage and supplier location.
types.backDescription: Reconditioned units undergo full strip-down, machining where needed, and assembly with new wear components. Ideal for Versos with 1ZR-FAE, 2ZR-FAE, 1AD-FTV or 2AD-FHV codes.
backBullets: Best for engines with internal wear but sound block

types.title: Toyota Verso Rebuilt Engines

types.frontDescription: Comprehensive rebuild addressing known failure points like timing chains or DPF sensors with upgraded parts.

items.title: Toyota Verso Diesel Engines
items.description: Diesel Versos (2009-2018) offered strong torque and economy but require DPF/EGR maintenance awareness, especially on short-journey use.
items.descriptor: Diesel Versos (2009-2018) offered strong torque and economy but require DPF/EGR maintenance awareness, especially on short-journey use.
items.familiesLabel: Common Toyota Verso Diesel Engine Families
families: 1AD-FTV - 2.0L D-4D, mainstream diesel with injector/EGR attention needed
2AD-FHV - 2.2L D-CAT, powerful but DPF sensor prone to P1426/P2002 codes
1CD-FTV - Corolla Verso 2.0L D-4D, timing belt drive requires scheduled changes
knownFor: Strong motorway fuel economy and towing capability
DPF differential pressure sensor failures on 2.2L units
High UK replacement demand on T Spirit and Excel diesel trims
items.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Verso Diesel replacement engines

items.title: Toyota Verso Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol Versos use reliable Valvematic technology with timing chains (not belts), but monitor oil consumption and water pump health on high-mileage units.
items.descriptor: Petrol Versos use reliable Valvematic technology with timing chains (not belts), but monitor oil consumption and water pump health on high-mileage units.
items.familiesLabel: Common Toyota Verso Petrol Engine Families
families: 1ZR-FAE - 1.6L Valvematic, most common engine with oil consumption risk
2ZR-FAE - 1.8L Valvematic, extra power for heavier loads, chain stretch at high mileage
1ZZ-FE/3ZZ-FE - Corolla Verso VVT-i units, simple but water pump prone
knownFor: Timing chain drive (low maintenance vs belt) on 2009+ models
Water pump replacement needed ~50,000 km intervals
Oil consumption on 1ZR-FAE units over 100k miles

engineYears.h2: Toyota Verso Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major Toyota Verso engine changes across production years, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The predecessor to the Verso, offering proven petrol and diesel engines with simpler maintenance but timing belt requirements on diesel units.
keyChanges: Corolla Verso launched with 1.6L/1.8L petrol and 2.0L D-4D diesel options
All engines use timing belts on diesel (1CD-FTV), chains on petrol
Facelift in 2007 updated styling and interior trim levels
knownFor: Reliable VVT-i petrol engines with straightforward maintenance
Diesel timing belt requires replacement every 60-80k miles
Water pump replacement common preventative item at ~50k km
years.cta: Get quotes for 2004-2009 Toyota Verso replacement engines
years.ticker: Corolla Verso timing belt replacement • 1CD-FTV injector failure • 1ZZ-FE water pump leak

years.description: The all-new Verso MPV launched with Valvematic petrol engines and advanced D-4D/D-CAT diesels, all using low-maintenance timing chains.
keyChanges: New platform replacing Corolla Verso with improved space and refinement
Introduction of 1ZR-FAE/2ZR-FAE Valvematic petrol engines (timing chain)
Diesel options: 1AD-FTV 2.0L and 2AD-FHV 2.2L D-CAT with DPF
knownFor: All engines use timing chains (not belts) - lower maintenance
1ZR-FAE oil consumption reported on high-mileage units
years.cta: Get quotes for 2009-2013 Toyota Verso replacement engines
years.ticker: Verso 1.6 oil consumption • 2.2 D-CAT DPF sensor • timing chain stretch 150k km

years.description: Updated styling and equipment levels with carryover engine range; peak replacement demand as first-gen units reach 150k+ km timing chain interval.
keyChanges: Cosmetic facelift with revised front/rear styling and interior updates
Excel trim added as new top specification level
Engine range unchanged but DPF/EGR issues more prevalent on diesels
knownFor: High replacement demand as units approach 150k km chain interval
DPF maintenance critical on 2.2L diesels with urban use patterns
Petrol engines generally more reliable long-term than diesel counterparts
years.cta: Get quotes for 2013-2018 Toyota Verso replacement engines
years.ticker: Verso Excel engine replacement • facelift model DPF issues • 1ZR-FAE piston rings

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Toyota Verso was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Toyota Verso specialists.

faq.h2: Toyota Verso Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Toyota Verso engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt Toyota Verso engine prices range from £800-£2,500 supply-only, depending on engine code and condition. Diesel 2.2L D-CAT units cost more than 1.6L petrol due to complexity.
keyPoints: 1ZR-FAE 1.6L petrol rebuilt: £800-£1,800 typical range
2AD-FHV 2.2L diesel rebuilt: £1,500-£2,500 typical range
Supply & fit labour adds £400-£800 depending on garage
items.cta: Compare Toyota Verso engine replacement prices now

items.question: Will an Auris engine fit my Toyota Verso?
items.answer: Yes, many Toyota Verso engines share codes with Auris and Corolla models, increasing parts availability and reducing replacement costs across the network.
keyPoints: 1ZR-FAE and 2ZR-FAE petrol engines fit Verso, Auris, Corolla
1AD-FTV and 2AD-FHV diesels also cross-platform compatible
Always verify engine code matches before ordering replacement
items.cta: Check Toyota Verso engine compatibility with Auris/Corolla

items.question: What is the most reliable Toyota Verso engine?
items.answer: Petrol Valvematic engines (1ZR-FAE, 2ZR-FAE) generally prove more reliable long-term than diesel D-CAT units, which require careful DPF/EGR maintenance.
keyPoints: Petrol engines use timing chains, not belts - lower maintenance
Diesel DPF systems need regular motorway driving to regenerate
Oil consumption on high-mileage 1ZR-FAE is manageable with monitoring
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Toyota Verso petrol vs diesel engine prices

items.question: How long do Toyota Verso engines last?
items.answer: Well-maintained Toyota Verso engines typically reach 220,000-370,000 km before major work, with timing chain replacement often needed around 150,000-200,000 km on petrol units.
keyPoints: Regular oil changes critical for longevity on all engines
Water pump replacement recommended every ~50,000 km on petrol
Diesel DPF maintenance extends life on short-journey vehicles
items.cta: Get quotes for high-mileage Toyota Verso engine replacement

items.question: What causes Toyota Verso 2.2 D-CAT engine failure?
items.answer: The 2AD-FHV 2.2L D-CAT commonly fails due to DPF differential pressure sensor errors (P1426/P2002), causing limp mode and eventual engine management issues.
keyPoints: DPF sensor failure triggers error codes and reduced power
Short-journey driving accelerates DPF clogging on diesel units
Rebuilt engines include upgraded sensors addressing original failure
items.cta: Compare rebuilt 2AD-FHV Toyota Verso engine prices

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Toyota Verso engine or buying a new car?
items.answer: For Versos in good condition with service history, a rebuilt engine (£800-£2,500) often offers better value than purchasing a replacement vehicle, especially with warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Factor in remaining vehicle value vs replacement engine cost
Rebuilt engines include 12-month warranty for peace of mind
Supply & fit options minimise downtime for family vehicles
items.cta: Calculate Toyota Verso engine replacement vs new car cost

items.question: Where can I buy a Toyota Verso replacement engine in the UK?
items.answer: EngineMarket connects you with vetted UK Toyota Verso engine specialists offering rebuilt, reconditioned and used engines with warranty and nationwide delivery options.
keyPoints: Network includes MPV-specialist garages experienced with Verso
All suppliers provide verified engine codes and condition reports
Compare multiple quotes before committing to replacement
items.cta: Find trusted Toyota Verso engine suppliers UK-wide

items.question: What warranty comes with a rebuilt Toyota Verso engine?
items.answer: Rebuilt Toyota Verso engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with some specialists offering extended coverage options.
keyPoints: Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Confirm exact terms with chosen supplier before ordering
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
items.cta: Compare Toyota Verso engine warranty options from UK specialists

items.question: How do I find my Toyota Verso engine code?
items.answer: Your Toyota Verso engine code appears on the engine block stamping, vehicle registration documents, or can be verified instantly by entering your registration on EngineMarket.
keyPoints: Common codes: 1ZR-FAE, 2ZR-FAE, 1AD-FTV, 2AD-FHV
Corolla Verso codes: 1ZZ-FE, 3ZZ-FE, 1CD-FTV
DVLA lookup via registration ensures exact match for ordering
items.cta: Identify your Toyota Verso engine code instantly

items.question: Can I upgrade my Toyota Verso to a more powerful engine?
items.answer: Engine swaps on the Toyota Verso are complex due to ECU, wiring and emissions compliance; sticking with the original engine code ensures reliability and legal road use.
keyPoints: Cross-platform compatibility exists with Auris/Corolla same-code engines
Performance upgrades require specialist tuning and may affect insurance
Rebuilt original-spec engines offer best balance of power and reliability
items.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Verso engine replacement to original specification
